name: PF: Door-to-Door Economic Audit
objective: Listen to household concerns regarding the rising cost of living.
mainMessage: PF: Restoring economic dignity. We are here to listen to your challenges and present our recovery plan.
talkingPoints: Economy: Present the 10-point plan for affordable mealie meal.
Agriculture: Discuss the return of subsidized fertilizer.
Energy: Explain our plan for stable fuel prices.

questions.prompt: Is the cost of mealie meal a major concern for you?

name: PF: Community Restoration Drive
objective: Engage community leaders on local infrastructure and security.
mainMessage: Defending our Heritage: Building community resilience together.
talkingPoints: Security: Strengthening local community police posts.
Markets: Plans for upgrading village market shelters.

name: PF: Lusaka Market Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming branch elections and membership drives.
mainMessage: PF: Join the Movement! Membership registration is happening this Sunday at the Chawama Market grounds.

name: PF Economic Recovery Rally
objective: Engage voters on the rising cost of living and present the PF vision for affordable essentials.
mainMessage: PF: Restoring economic dignity for all Zambians. Bringing back affordable mealie meal.
talkingPoints: Subsidized Agriculture: Lowering the cost of production.
Fuel Stability: Implementing long-term fixed price contracts.
